title: linum tenuifolium var. appressum
intro: Linum tenuifolium var. appressum, commonly known as flax or blue flax, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Linaceae family and is native to western North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Linum tenuifolium var. appressum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health issues, such as eczema, acne, and minor cuts and scrapes.
